title: erigeron coulteri
intro: Erigeron coulteri, also known as Coulter's fleabane or Coulter's daisy, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as soothing sore throats, calming digestive issues, and reducing fever. Erigeron coulteri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
